highlights.text: I wrote yesterday: “Short-term for tomorrow, the bull case is unchanged and is that the range we have spent the last two days in is a bull flag with 5782 resistance and 5751/5738 supports.

Can this base lead to a green end to “the most bearish month of the year?” In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a run down on the multiple failed breakdowns and level reclaims that propelled this recent move up (its been a good practical education into my core setup and how it functions).

Beginning last Wednesday, we finally made the trap to what was always the inevitably magnet for this rally: A New ATH in ES, and I wrote last Tuesday 1 week ago at 4pm: “As long as 5680-85 keeps holding we can simply continue building out the base we have spent the last several days in.

post_title: Will September Finish Green For SPX? Sept 25th Plan
